task_description: Implement The Rullet in ./source using .omx/reports/the-rullet-implementation-brief-2026-03-15.md as the source of truth. Read and apply .omx/reports/the-rullet-mono-ui-spec-2026-03-15.md, .omx/reports/the-rullet-retention-ux-handoff-2026-03-15.md, .omx/reports/the-rullet-monetization-guardrails-2026-03-15.md, and .omx/context/rullet-implementation-toss-mood-latest.md. Preserve marble physics, ship Compose -> Draw -> Result, make the UX feel in the same mood as Toss: restrained, trustworthy, mono-first, utility-led, smartphone-friendly, and clearly less like the original Marble Roulette. Keep current WebView runtime unless blocked. Include loading/empty/error states, no core-flow monetization, explicit verification, and architect sign-off before completion.
staffing_summary: test-engineer x1 (primary implementation lane, medium reasoning); test-engineer x1 (evidence + regression checks, medium reasoning); architect x1 (final architecture / completion sign-off, high reasoning)
